title: CD Projekt Red admits it lost some fans' trust forever after Cyberpunk 2077
summary: Executives of the Polish studio acknowledge that the disastrous RPG launch caused some players to lose faith in the company indefinitely.

title: Claude Guillemot, co-founder of Ubisoft, dies in a plane crash
summary: The French businessman, brother of the founders, died when his aircraft crashed during a private flight.

title: Obsidian faces class-action lawsuit for violation of wage laws
summary: The video game studio is accused of not paying overtime and fair wages to its employees.

title: Don't Starve Together reaches new concurrent player record ten years after its release
summary: The cooperative survival game surpassed its previous peak of concurrent players on Steam, demonstrating its longevity.

title: Naruto will have an official collectible card game for the first time in over ten years
summary: Bandai Namco announced the launch of a TCG based on the popular ninja manga and anime.

title: Bleach has a date for its definitive ending, 22 years after the manga's start
summary: The animation studio confirmed the release of the series' final story arc in 2025.

title: New animated television series of Higurashi When They Cry announced
summary: The horror franchise returns with a new anime adaptation.

title: Bandai Namco confirms My Hero Academia: All's Justice for Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The fighting game based on the anime will come to Nintendo's new console.

title: Fortnite Gone Wild: event dates, new skins and content
summary: Epic Games' battle royale presents a new themed season with nature elements.

title: Valorant launches 2026 Season Act 4 with a new map and game mode
summary: Riot Games seeks to revitalize the tactical shooter with fresh content that promises to bring players back.

title: Microsoft makes it easier to publish games on Xbox on PC to compete with Steam
summary: The company announced measures to simplify the release of titles on its ecosystem for computers.

title: Ori creator compares Game Pass to communism and criticizes its impact on game quality
summary: Thomas Mahler points out that Xbox's subscription model encourages the creation of mediocre video games.

title: UK government paid officials to play GTA Online in a social research project
summary: The initiative aimed to study player behavior in virtual environments.

title: Ambitious GTA 4 mod turns Liberty City into a rural town in Wisconsin
summary: The total conversion sets the game in a rural area in Fargo style, with a pizza delivery that goes wrong.

title: Rick and Morty brings back a fan-favorite character from the first season
summary: The latest episode of the animated series brings back a popular character that hadn't appeared since the beginning.

title: Toy Story 5: defense of the anti-technology message against its critics
summary: The upcoming Pixar film is defended for its balanced approach to technology in family life.

title: Pokémon Pokopia's Bubbly Basin DLC promises to break the curse of water levels
summary: The expansion introduces an underwater environment that aims to be fun and well-designed.

title: Poppy Playtime director reveals he has played 23,000 hours on Steam to understand the market
summary: Bryce Clark explains that his obsession with learning the market has led him to accumulate a record number of hours.

title: Morrowind receives improvements to script support for magic mods and bug fixes
summary: A new update boosts mod creation and stability of Bethesda's classic RPG.

title: AI stigma on Steam reduces game reviews by up to 53% and makes them more negative
summary: A data study reveals that being labeled as AI negatively affects the quantity and tone of reviews.
